creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

During startup you might have given some boot information,
is the CD/DVD drive detected there? If you were to use
lets say FreeSBIE or PC-BSD, what information do you get
then? (They are build upon FreeBSD releases). Perhaps the
latter step might be required so that we can see what happens
at what stage in case we cannot see the startup information
from the installation-cd (CD-1)

Cheers,
Remko

-- 
Kind regards,

      Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
      FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

      /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
